candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row in the operating section appears positioned with Administrative expenses components, not with Cost of Revenues - Total. Cost of Revenues - Total is already explained by operating expense lines such as Operating expenses and Property tax, so this D&A row does not appear to be a separate COGS-related D&A amount to add.

variables.notes: No separate COGS-related D&A row is visible above the financial section.

candidates.why: This D&A row appears to be a component within Administrative expenses rather than a separate same-level SG&A line. In the year where the component detail is visible, Administrative expenses approximately equals Personnel costs + Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Balancing value + Amortisation/ depreciation + Non-Recurring Income/Expense - Other, indicating the D&A is already embedded in the selected parent row.

variables.notes: Amortisation/ depreciation appears included within Administrative expenses, so adding it separately would double count.
